title: Constraints produce better output than freedom.
detail: The agent had a favorite move: analyze forever, ship nothing. The fix was not a smarter prompt. It was a contract with time limits and escalation rules.
quote: First action in 2 minutes. Stuck after 5 minutes means escalate. Task too big means decompose it and start the first part immediately.
author: @Forge_Builds
footer: The machine should move, not negotiate with itself.
